nodes.label: Long position take-profit: sell when price rises above target.
nodes.norm_label: long position take-profit: sell when price rises above target.

nodes.label: Short position take-profit: buy when price falls below target.
nodes.norm_label: short position take-profit: buy when price falls below target.

nodes.label: Security Backlog
nodes.rationale: Added after 2026-04-28 security audit; contains 1 Critical, 5 High, 4 Medium, 2 Low findings with exact file paths (app.py:164-201, main.js:645,842,890). Most urgent: add Depends(_require_admin) to GET /api/settings/app and move POST /api/brief/trigger to priv router.

nodes.label: Lesson: 4-Flag Trigger Uses Body High Not Wick
nodes.rationale: Pattern trigger price must span full pattern using max(bar[body_hi]) across all 4 flag bars, not just the last bar.
nodes.norm_label: lesson: 4-flag trigger uses body high not wick

nodes.label: Lesson: calc_sl Always Uses Wick
nodes.rationale: SL is always wick-based. Body-based SL is no longer a code path.

nodes.label: Lesson: EC2 PEM Key Newline Mangling
nodes.rationale: _normalize_pem() must handle 3 storage formats: real newlines, \\n, and n-separated. Never assume PEM format from env var.
nodes.norm_label: lesson: ec2 pem key newline mangling

nodes.label: Lesson: Firebase Auth Domain Must Match Exactly
nodes.rationale: Dev server must be accessed at localhost:8000, never 127.0.0.1:8000, because Firebase only pre-authorizes localhost.
nodes.norm_label: lesson: firebase auth domain must match exactly

nodes.label: GTI (Go To Indikator) Zones
nodes.rationale: Weekly zones provide context, Daily zones plan the trade, 4H zones give precise entry. Zone types: STZ, DTZ, SZ, DZ. Trade priority: STZ Breakdown > DTZ Breakout > SZ Breakdown > DZ Breakout > DZ Breakdown > SZ Breakout.

nodes.label: Entry Candle Rules (Full-Body Breakout/Breakdown)
nodes.rationale: Full Bodied Green Candle = Breakout (Buy/Long); Full Bodied Red Candle = Breakdown (Sell/Short). Entry on 4H zone close with SL+50 offset.

nodes.label: Reversal Candle Patterns
nodes.rationale: Shooting Star, Engulfing, Morning Star, Evening Star used for reversal detection.

nodes.label: Ping Pong Session Zone
nodes.rationale: Zone resets every 4-hour session using IST open candle (01:30, 05:30, 09:30, 13:30, 17:30, 21:30 UTC+05:30). Blue line 200pts below (Buy), Red line 200pts above (Sell), Yellow lines 200pts further out (SL). Can be drawn as Trend Line, Rectangle, or Fibonacci Retracement.

nodes.label: Mean-Reversion Scalping Logic
nodes.rationale: Target 400pts; SL 200pts; 3-min timeframe; 10-12 trades/day; 46% win rate still profitable. Targets sideways market (70-80% of BTC time). 8222 trades backtested Dec 2024-Dec 2025 on 1min TF.

nodes.label: Escalator Trailing Stop Grid
nodes.rationale: Entry: Long +200pts / Short -200pts from Baseline. 200pt trailing stop locks profits every 200pts. Strategy ends after 3 consecutive negative/zero SL hits. Fibonacci grid with 200pt bands.

nodes.label: Escalator as High-Volatility Complement to Ping Pong
nodes.rationale: Escalator Zone overlays on top of Ping Pong Zone on the same chart. Where Ping Pong fades moves, Escalator rides them.
nodes.norm_label: escalator as high-volatility complement to ping pong

nodes.label: Strategy 4: Chauke pe Chauka Strategy
nodes.source_file: strategies/4 Chauke pe Chauka Strategy PDF.pdf

nodes.label: StochRSI Momentum Filter
nodes.source_file: strategies/4 Chauke pe Chauka Strategy PDF.pdf
nodes.rationale: RSI Length 14, Stochastic Length 14, K=3, D=3. Long: K&D < 40; Short: K&D > 60. Prevents counter-momentum entries.

nodes.label: Chauke Zone Upper/Lower Line Entry Rules
nodes.source_file: strategies/4 Chauke pe Chauka Strategy PDF.pdf
nodes.rationale: Long from Zone Upper Lines, Short from Zone Lower Lines. Fixed target 1950pts. No-entry if candle body > 200pts. Protective stop: tighten SL to lock 100pts after 200pt favorable move. 61% win rate, 3-4 trades/day.
nodes.norm_label: chauke zone upper/lower line entry rules

nodes.label: Sunday Weekly Session Open Entry
nodes.rationale: Every Sunday 10pm IST (00:00 if POC or high volatility). Long/Short on breakout/breakdown of Daily GTI Zone. Trail from 500pts base to 1000pt target. 85.71% win rate over 42 trades (May 2025-Mar 2026), avg 725pts/trade.

nodes.label: Strategy 6: BTC Double Profit Strategy
nodes.source_file: strategies/6 BTC Double Profit Strategy PDF.pdf

nodes.label: Double Profit T1/T2 Split Exit
nodes.source_file: strategies/6 BTC Double Profit Strategy PDF.pdf
nodes.rationale: x=50% recommended split for T1 exit. Short from SZ: SL=300pts, T1=1100pts, T2=2250pts. Short from STZ: SL=500pts, T1=850pts. 40% win rate (lowest of 6 strategies) compensated by asymmetric target structure. Dynamic zone exit overrides fixed T1/T2.

nodes.label: Shared 150x Leverage Risk (500pt Liquidation Buffer)
nodes.rationale: All high-leverage strategies (Ping Pong, Escalator) share the same 500pt liquidation buffer warning at 150x leverage. Conservative recommendation is 10x-40x.

nodes.label: GTI Zone Infrastructure (Shared Across Strategies)
nodes.rationale: GTI Zones (4 Hourly/Daily/Weekly) are referenced across all 6 strategies as the core zone framework. STZ, DTZ, SZ, DZ zone types appear in Strategies 1, 4, 5, and 6.
